# mrwuliu's blog

> Personal blog by mrwuliu. Topics include software engineering, web development, cloud computing, and technology. Available in Chinese and English.

## About

This is a personal blog powered by Cloudflare Workers, built with Hono framework, D1 database, and R2 storage. Content covers software engineering practices, web technologies, and developer tools.

## Structure

- [Home](/): Latest blog posts with pagination
- [Writings](/writings): Complete archive of all published posts
- [Projects](/projects): Side projects and open-source work
- [Tags](/tags-cloud): Browse posts by topic tags
- [About](/about): About the author

## Feed

- RSS: https://mrwuliu.top/feed.xml

## Languages

- Chinese (default): https://mrwuliu.top/
- English: https://mrwuliu.top/en/

## Technical Details

- Runtime: Cloudflare Workers (edge)
- Framework: Hono
- Database: D1 (SQLite)
- Storage: R2
- SSR: hono/jsx server-side rendering
